${mod_id}.modmenu.category.general.name: §lGeneral
${mod_id}.modmenu.group.main.name: §lMain
${mod_id}.modmenu.option.mod_enabled.des: If enabled, nearest entities will be translucent; if disabled, won't.
${mod_id}.modmenu.group.hiding.name: §lHiding
${mod_id}.modmenu.group.hiding.descripti: Settings that control the power of entities translucent.
${mod_id}.modmenu.option.pixel_size.name: Pixel Size
${mod_id}.modmenu.option.pixel_size.desc:
The size of the dithering dots in screen pixels.

The bigger the value, the chunkier the dithering pattern.
${mod_id}.modmenu.option.far.name: Far Distance
${mod_id}.modmenu.option.far.description:
The distance at which the particle starts to become translucent.

The closer particle is to you, the more transparent it will be!
${mod_id}.modmenu.option.near.name: Near Distance
${mod_id}.modmenu.option.near.descriptio: The distance at which the particle becomes completely translucent.
${mod_id}.modmenu.option.min_value.name: Min Value
${mod_id}.modmenu.option.min_value.descr:
The minimum visibility of the particle, so it never fully disappears.

The higher the value, the more visible the closest entities stay (at 1.0 they are never hidden).
